Personal data processing

Privacy notice and authorization.

Content based on the existing public policy. It must be reviewed and updated by legal counsel before migration to the new site.

Conceptual architecture
Draft pending legal approval. Do not publish without review.

Controller

Eagle Commercial S.A., tax identification number 830.040.391-7 and domiciled in Bogotá, acts as controller of personal information supplied through requests, business relationships, events, procurement processes and other authorized interactions.

General purposes

  • Respond to requests and maintain internal databases.
  • Manage invitations, events, courses, seminars and training.
  • Assess satisfaction and conduct studies or diagnostics.
  • Carry out authorized commercial and relationship activities.
  • Manage suppliers and procurement processes.
  • Generate statistics and reports.
  • Respond to petitions and legal obligations.
  • Transmit information to partners or affiliates where a legal basis and applicable authorization exist.

Data subject rights

  • Access personal data at no cost.
  • Know, update and correct information.
  • Request proof of authorization.
  • Submit complaints to the competent authority.
  • Withdraw authorization or request deletion where applicable.
  • Decline to answer questions about sensitive data.

Contact channel

Queries and requests related to personal data are received at info@eaglecommercial.com.co or at the current corporate office.

info@eaglecommercial.com.co

Technology engineering and integration for organizations operating in critical environments.

info@eaglecommercial.com.co

Capabilities

  • Intelligence and situational awareness
  • Critical communications
  • Signal monitoring and analysis
  • Electronic security and countermeasures
  • Protection against uncrewed systems

Contact

Bogotá D.C., Colombia Cra. 11A No. 93-93, oficinas 405 y 406 (+57) 617 1933 Lunes a viernes, 8:00 a. m. a 5:00 p. m.

This prototype uses local storage only to remember your cookie preference. It includes no analytics or advertising.
